news.title:
Indraprastha Gas Ltd assures uninterrupted PNG, CNG supply despite Middle East conflict.
Global energy market volatility won't affect IGL's household and vehicle gas supply.
news.summary:

news.title:
Gas distribution stocks like GAIL, Petronet LNG, Indraprastha Gas surged as Trump hinted Iran conflict could end soon.
Sensex rose 621 points, Nifty gained 222 points; energy stocks rallied amid hopes of eased geopolitical tensions.
news.summary:
Gas distribution stocks like GAIL, Petronet LNG, Indraprastha Gas surged as Trump hinted Iran conflict could end soon.
Sensex rose 621 points, Nifty gained 222 points; energy stocks rallied amid hopes of eased geopolitical tensions.

news.title:
Shares of IGL and MGL dropped 7% and 10%, driven by US-Israel conflict impacting natural gas and crude prices.
Nomura warns IGL and MGL face Ebitda drops if LNG costs rise; Gujarat Gas issued force majeure notices to industrial clients.
news.summary:
Shares of IGL and MGL dropped 7% and 10%, driven by US-Israel conflict impacting natural gas and crude prices.
Nomura warns IGL and MGL face Ebitda drops if LNG costs rise; Gujarat Gas issued force majeure notices to industrial clients.

news.title:
City gas firms like Adani Total Gas, Indraprastha Gas, and Gujarat Gas are expanding into smaller cities for growth.

This signals strong financial health and shareholder returns.

news.title:
Indraprastha Gas Q3 net profit falls 3.8% to ₹358 crore; revenue rises 1.1% to ₹4,067 crore.
EBITDA grows 6.7% to ₹472.5 crore, with margin improving to 11.6% from 11%.
news.summary:
Indraprastha Gas Q3 net profit falls 3.8% to ₹358 crore; revenue rises 1.1% to ₹4,067 crore.
EBITDA grows 6.7% to ₹472.5 crore, with margin improving to 11.6% from 11%.

Refining margins and LPG compensation may support profits, while crude prices and currency affect realisations.

news.title:

news.title:
Indraprastha Gas Ltd (IGL) reduces domestic PNG prices by ₹0.70/scm in Delhi-NCR.
New rates are ₹47.89/scm in Delhi and ₹46.70/scm in Gurugram after PNGRB's tariff overhaul.
news.summary:

news.title:
Indraprastha Gas (IGL) forms a JV with Hindustan Waste Treatment for biofuel projects, with 50:50 equity participation.

news.title:
